description: You are a robotics perception engineer calibrating a warehouse simulation. The current lighting is incorrect and will ruin the camera-based perception validation. Configure the lighting in the simulation world to match measured facility conditions by modifying the existing DirectionalLight (direction: 0.3 -1 -0.5, intensity: 0.4, color: 1 0.95 0.85, castShadows: TRUE) and the Background node (luminosity: 1.2). Additionally, add two PointLight nodes at locations [-2 4 0] and [2 4 0], both with intensity 0.6, color 0.95 0.95 1.0, and attenuation 0 0 1. Save the final world to /home/ga/Desktop/warehouse_lighting.wbt.
